goal: First, add the following recipes into the Broccoli app: 1) 'Garlic Bread' with directions 'Spread butter and garlic on bread, bake at 375F'. 2) 'Garlic Shrimp' with directions 'Saute shrimp with garlic and olive oil'. 3) 'Fruit Salad' with directions 'Mix strawberries, blueberries, and grapes'. 4) 'Garlic Chicken' with directions 'Marinate chicken with garlic and herbs, bake'. Then, delete the recipes from Broccoli app that use garlic in the directions.

setup_recipes.title: Garlic Bread
setup_recipes.description: Spread butter and garlic on bread, bake at 375F

setup_recipes.title: Garlic Shrimp
setup_recipes.description: Saute shrimp with garlic and olive oil
